pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he's still in the other room, but then i remember. the house feels... empty. like i'm just a ghost walking through these rooms. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. everything just feels pointless without him.

pool.baseline: honestly i was just looking at some photos of the deep field from the webb telescope and i just felt sick. like, how are we even supposed to care about anything? everything we do is just a tiny blip in a vast, cold vacuum that doesn't even know we're here. it feels like we're just performing this exhausting play for an empty theater.
pool.message: honestly i was just looking at some photos of the deep field from the webb telescope and i just felt sick. like, how are we even supposed to care about anything? everything we do is just a tiny blip in a vast, cold vacuum that doesn't even know we're here. it feels like we're just performing this exhausting play for an empty theater.

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm typing this. i just feel like i've hit a wall that i can't climb over. everything i worked for in the lab, the fellowship, the years of basically living in that building... it's all just gone. the funding was pulled and my PI won't even look me in the eye. i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this research, and without it, i'm just... empty. i am so incredibly tired of trying to fight for a life that feels like it's constantly slipping away. i just want everything to stop. i just want to sleep and not have to wake up to this weight anymore.

pool.baseline: The candles have all guttered out, and the silence of this house is more deafening than any scream. He is gone, and with him, the very light of my soul. I feel as though I am walking through a thick, cold fog, where every step is heavier than the last. There is no path forward, only this hollow, aching emptiness. It feels as though the world has simply ceased to want me.

pool.baseline: i feel like i cant even walk down the street without feeling like everyone is laughing at me. even when i'm alone, i just see the comments and the posts in my head. it never stops. it feels like the whole world is just one big crowd of people waiting for me to mess up so they can tear me apart. i just want to disappear.
